entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistics related to agriculture that should correspond to ground situations and determine crop extent and farming practices

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants whose actual extent is determined through statistics

entities.name: CULTIVATION
entities.description: The act of preparing land and growing crops

entities.name: FARMING PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods and techniques used in farming

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL DATA
entities.description: Reliable and retraceable data regarding location, independent of climate

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC REGIONS
entities.description: Different regions characterized by specific climatic and soil conditions for agriculture

entities.name: GEO-STAMPING
entities.description: An approach for generating crop statistics using geospatial tools

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used in the geo-stamping approach for data collection

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A method of gathering information about an object or phenomenon without making physical contact

entities.name: GPS
entities.description: Global Positioning System used for precise location tracking

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information System used for capturing and analyzing spatial data

entities.name: PLOT-LEVEL INVENTORY
entities.description: A detailed record of assets or crops at the individual plot level
